gene_region.label: MC4R transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical MC4R genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window relative to the reverse-strand transcription start, used to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: MC4R encodes melanocortin 4 receptor, a hypothalamic G protein-coupled receptor. This bundle emphasizes melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local MC4R bundle is melanocortin receptor signaling oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls.
variant_effect_overview: MC4R variants can alter or tag melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.
Common markers, pharmacogenetic alleles, structural events, and high-impact pathogenic variants should be kept separate during interpretation.
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: MC4R methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for MC4R.
Because MC4R biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.
Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use MC4R promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000166603: MC4R coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: MC4R biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: MC4R: melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking
biorender_visuals.template_title: Intracellular Layout - Receptor Signaling from Plasma Membrane to Nucleus (2)
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a MC4R melanocortin receptor signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking and Monogenic obesity review context, Appetite and energy-balance biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs17782313 (near MC4R obesity marker) is curated as a MC4R marker for Monogenic obesity review context, Appetite and energy-balance biology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
research_context: Use this marker as a MC4R pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs17782313 (near MC4R obesity marker) with MC4R methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.

literature_findings.genotypes: rs17782313 (near MC4R obesity marker) or linked MC4R locus genotype states

literature_findings.finding: The local curation treats rs17782313 (near MC4R obesity marker) as a gene-specific marker for Monogenic obesity review context, Appetite and energy-balance biology and melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking.
